hero.title: Trusted <highlight>Khad, Beej & Dawai</highlight> Store for Every Farmer
hero.subtitle: M/S Ramgopal Gupta provides top-quality fertilizers, high-yield seeds, and effective pesticides at wholesale & retail prices in Mangawan, Rewa.

about.title: Empowering Farmers with Quality Agriculture Supplies
about.desc: Located at the heart of Mangawan, Rewa, M/S Ramgopal Gupta has been the backbone for local farmers for over two decades. We believe in providing not just products, but solutions that yield better crops and prosperous lives.
about.f1_desc: We source directly from top brands to ensure you get authentic fertilizers and seeds.
about.f2_desc: Whether you need a single bag or bulk quantities, we offer the best prices for all.
about.f3_desc: Our experienced staff helps you choose the right products for your specific crop needs.
about.f4_desc: Serving the farming community of Mangawan and Rewa with honesty and dedication.

categories.title: Everything Your Farm Needs
categories.desc: From preparing the soil to protecting the harvest, we stock all top-quality agricultural inputs.
categories.c1_desc: Urea, DAP, NPK, and organic fertilizers for maximum crop yield and soil health.
categories.c2_desc: High-germination hybrid and traditional seeds for wheat, paddy, soybean, and pulses.
categories.c3_desc: Effective crop protection chemicals to safeguard your harvest from diseases.
categories.c4_desc: Targeted solutions to keep your fields weed-free and protect plants from harmful insects.

whyus.title: The Preferred Choice of Local Farmers
whyus.desc: We don't just sell products; we partner with you for a better harvest.
whyus.r2_desc: Competitive rates to keep your farming affordable.
whyus.r3_desc: Always available to hear your queries.
whyus.r4_desc: Thousands of happy farmers in Mangawan.
whyus.r5_desc: Buy one bag or a hundred, same great service.
whyus.r6_desc: Free advice on crop protection and yield.

brands.title: Authorized Dealers for Top Agriculture Brands

testimonials.title: Kya Kehte Hain Hamare Kisan Bhai?
testimonials.desc: Real experiences from local farmers who trust us for their agricultural needs.

gallery.title: A Glimpse of Our Store
gallery.desc: See the scale of our operations and the quality products we deliver to our farmers everyday.
